use_cases: Split-pane code or text editors with user-adjustable panel sizes
Dashboard layouts with resizable sidebar and content sections
Email or project management interfaces with collapsible resizeable panes
File explorers or data grids requiring flexible column widths
Any application needing adaptive split-view layouts for different workflows
ai_summary: A composite resizable panel layout system built on react-resizable-panels that provides flexible split-view functionality. Features horizontal and vertical panel groups with draggable resize handles, optional grip indicators, and accessibility support via focus-visible states. Ideal for building IDE-style editors, dashboard layouts, and multi-pane interfaces where users need to dynamically adjust content area proportions.
